items.title: Police rescue more than 400 cats from being eaten in Vietnam in a bust of a major animal theft ring

items.title: Indian cricketer, 15, hits record-breaking 50 in just 11 balls
items.dek: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks the record for the fastest 50-over List A half-century in history on the same day he was not included in India's one-day internation
items.body: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks the record for the fastest 50-over List A half-century in history on the same day he was not included in India's one-day international squad.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
items.dek: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.
items.body: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.
items.author: IriLine Desk
